description:
Parent epic: V3 E4: Actions and tools

Source task 5/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Remove or hide low-level tool machinery from beginner docs.

Epic closure criteria:
- the public DSL reads as actions/capabilities, not plumbing
- all operation surfaces have consistent validation and inspection
- tests cover duplicate/invalid operation registration

comments.text: Removed low-level provider tool wording from beginner-facing docs and usage rules, keeping tool terminology only where it names the existing DSL block or integration boundary.

title: E4: Remove or hide low-level tool machinery from beginner docs
